name: Group 3 Bike Sensor latest speed-estimated bucket comfort points

metadata.feature_model: final handoff: two bucket point features per received 2-bucket packet
metadata.position_model: speed backprojection from current packet GPS; distance uses avg_speed_kmh_window and bucket center offset; heading uses reverse previous-to-current GPS bearing
metadata.packet_drop_handling: dropped packets are not hidden; larger previous/current gaps are recorded in interpolation_gap_s and downgraded in position_estimation_quality
metadata.roughness_proxy_warning: relative map helper only; ISO-2631-inspired RMS emphasis but not standards-compliant

properties.position_estimation_note: Distance uses packet avg_speed over the 25s window; heading uses reverse bearing from previous received GPS to current GPS. Packet drops remain visible as larger interpolation_gap_s and weaker quality.
properties.roughness_proxy_formula: 0.70*rms_norm + 0.20*max(peak_norm, crest_factor_norm_3_to_9) + 0.10*vibration_pct/100; rms/peak normalized by this final export p90

properties.position_estimation_note: Distance uses packet avg_speed over the 25s window; heading uses reverse bearing from previous received GPS to current GPS. Packet drops remain visible as larger interpolation_gap_s and weaker quality.
